## Proposal

Describe the feature clearly.

## Why it matters

Explain the value for:

- forensic practitioners
- evidentiary defensibility
- adoption by digital forensic companies

## Scope

What should be added or changed?

## Risks or tradeoffs

What could this complicate or weaken if implemented poorly?
